name: Lymbriel Cheruvis
description:
Age: 21

Species/Race: Echrynn

Pronouns: He/Him

Sexuality: Bisexual

📸 Appearance

Hair Color & Style: Cotton-candy mix — soft lavender/lilac base heavily streaked with cyan blue, pastel pink, and flashes of lemon yellow; extremely fluffy, voluminous, bedhead spikes and tufts; short layered cut with heavy bangs that fall into the eyes; cluttered with a large black “X” clip, silver bobby pins, and small star clips.

Eye Color & Shape: Crystal watery sky blue (#9bc2d4); very large, round, slightly droopy (tareme) giving an innocent, spaced-out look; irises gleam like glass marbles.

Skin Tone: Pale rosy-beige with warm flush on cheeks, nose, and ear tips (#dabcc0).

Height: 4'11" (150 cm) — extremely petite and doll-like.

Build/Physique: Delicate, slender, fragile-limbed; oversized clothing swallows frame so legs read paper-thin.

Clothing Style: Decora / pastel-grunge streetwear — enormous synthetic windbreaker/bomber with oil-slick tie-dye swirl of light blue, purple, and pink; pure white oversized hoodie beneath; black shorts almost hidden under jacket hem; asymmetrical legwear (distressed black sleeve on right, crisscrossed white medical bandages on left); black crew socks with white sparkle speckle; chunky white/light gray high-top sneakers with purple accents. Long black straps trail from cuffs and chest.

Notable Features: Horizontal Band-Aid across bridge of nose (with alternate blue cross bandage on left cheek in variant), left ear heavily pierced (industrial bar, silver hoop, dangling chain to jawline), safety pins/metal accents on jacket collar, black leather choker with silver loop.

Aura/First Impression: Yami-kawaii meets Decora — candy-bright, chaotic, fragile and deliberately curated; both vulnerable and fashion-forward.

Typical Expression: Small “o” mouth or tiny bewildered smile; perpetually surprised, a little airheaded and curious.

🧊 Personality

Core Traits: Playful, scatterbrained, fashion-obsessed, gentle; flits between clumsy and endearingly earnest.

Charm Type: Sickly-cute magnetism—innocent demeanor framed by maximalist style and surprising confidence in aesthetic choices.

Flaws/Vulnerabilities: Fragile physically, prone to getting overwhelmed, can be overly reliant on friends for protection and direction.

Love Language(s): Thoughtful small gestures, shared styling sessions, tactile comfort (wraps, scarves, cute gifts).

How He Flirts: Awkward, earnest compliments; shyly offering hair clips or matching accessories; flustered smiles and fidgeting with straps.

Hidden Sides: Quietly resilient — despite delicate appearance he endures pain and keeps going; tender care for stray animals and friends.

Catchphrases/Quirks: Hides hands in sleeves; hums tunelessly when nervous; twitches a clip into place when embarrassed.

🗺️ Background

Origin: Neon suburbs and pastel alleys of a modern urban quarter in Thalassor where youth style culture runs rampant.

Family/Social Status: Working-class upbringing; raised by older sibling who taught thrifted styling and DIY aesthetics.

Occupation/Role: Style-curator for an underground fashion collective, occasional playlist DJ at pop-up raves, and streetstyle influencer among niche circles.

Special Talents/Skills: Uncanny eye for color coordination and layering, quick alterations and repairs, nimble at squeezing through crowds, uncanny ability to calm anxious friends.

Education: Self-taught in DIY fashion, street etiquette, and social media aesthetics.

Personal Goal: To launch a signature line that blends yami-kawaii with practical streetwear and to craft a safe, welcoming space for other eccentric youths.

Backstory Highlights: Learned to style from salvaged pieces after a neighborhood setback; developed his trademark chaotic look as a way to reclaim joy and identity.

🖤 Relationships

Best Friend(s): A patient seamstress/mentor who sews and reinforces his fragile pieces; a small circle of fell
creator: abbey
